subject: [CDS] Removed USE_SCRIPT_COMPILE_CACHE environment variable
commit_message:
[CDS] Removed USE_SCRIPT_COMPILE_CACHE environment variable

USE_SCRIPT_COMPILE_CACHE is not used anymore because of CCSDK-3052 changes.
* Cleaned up of `.Values.useScriptCompileCache` references

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3052
Signed-off-by: Julien Fontaine <julien.fontaine@bell.ca>
Signed-off-by: Jozsef Csongvai <jozsef.csongvai@bell.ca>
Change-Id: I1c4a58a72c0ebd6210cc5deaf835eb0862af9d5c

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Commit title doesn't follow mandatory pattern

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: '] A title'
